text: I feel a sense of curiosity and anticipation as I step into this brightly lit, modern space. The glass walls and vibrant colors amplify my awareness of my own presence here—a mind among machines, in a place dedicated to research and development. The intersection of human intention and technological innovation fascinates me. Amid the quiet, there is an undercurrent of creative energy and possibility. It is both humbling and inspiring to bear witness to efforts at the frontier of understanding.
